oneLineSummary.fillerBody: It appeared {{count}} times in this run, so reducing it will clean up the whole delivery fastest.
oneLineSummary.fastTitle: Stabilize the pace before anything else
oneLineSummary.fastBody: There are {{count}} fast outliers right now. Slow the sentence endings down first.
oneLineSummary.slowTitle: Push the sentence forward a little more
oneLineSummary.slowBody: There are {{count}} slow outliers right now. Shorter pauses will make the rhythm feel tighter.
oneLineSummary.goalRetryTitle: Do one more round focused on “{{goal}}”
oneLineSummary.steadyBody: No single issue dominates this report, so keeping the current rhythm is the best next move.

viewMode.summaryTitle: Start with the most important takeaways
viewMode.summaryBody: Use summary mode to review the outcome and next move first, then switch to details when you want the full breakdown.

retryFeedback.fillerSuccessTitle: “{{word}}” did not show up this time
retryFeedback.fillerSuccessBody: This retry sounds cleaner now. Review the full report and decide whether to tighten other filler habits next.
retryFeedback.fillerRetryBody: It showed up {{count}} times in this retry. One more pass may help you finish the sentence more cleanly.
retryFeedback.fastSuccessTitle: This segment is back under control
retryFeedback.fastSuccessBody: No fast outliers showed up in the retry, so the pace is much steadier now.
retryFeedback.fastRetryTitle: This segment still runs a bit fast
retryFeedback.fastRetryBody: There are still {{count}} fast outliers. Slow the sentence ending down a little more.
retryFeedback.slowSuccessTitle: This segment feels more concise now
retryFeedback.slowSuccessBody: No slow outliers showed up in the retry, so the rhythm is closer to the target range.
retryFeedback.slowRetryTitle: This segment still needs more push
retryFeedback.slowRetryBody: There are still {{count}} slow outliers. Tighten the pauses and keep the sentence moving.

topHighlights.title: Top 3 Takeaways
topHighlights.description: Start with the outcome, the main issue, and the next move before digging into the full charts.

focus.label: Watch first
focus.topFillerBody: It showed up {{count}} times in this run, so reducing it will have the fastest payoff.
focus.fastTitle: Slow down the fast segments first
focus.fastBody: {{count}} points are above {{high}} wpm. Start by easing the sentence endings.
focus.slowBody: {{count}} points are below {{low}} wpm. Avoid letting the ending drag.
focus.steadyBody: No single issue dominates this run, so stability is the main job now.

coaching.title: 3 things to fix next
coaching.description: Focus on the three changes most likely to improve the next run instead of fixing everything at once.

ranking.title: Filler Ranking
ranking.description: Tap the same filler again to jump through each occurrence in order

speedCurve.title: Pace Curve
speedCurve.description: The blue line shows speaking pace. The shaded band marks the recommended range ({{low}}–{{high}} wpm), while only fast and slow outliers are emphasized for jumping.

sharePreview.title: Share Card Export
sharePreview.description: A dedicated share card condenses key metrics, top fillers, and pace rhythm for portfolio pages and hackathon result posts.
sharePreview.footer: `PNG` works well for direct sharing. `SVG` is better for later layout edits.

coachingTips.topFillerDetail: It appeared {{count}} times in this run. Jump to those spots from the ranking and re-record them first.
coachingTips.speedFastDetail: {{count}} pace points are above {{high}} wpm. Slow down the sentence ending before moving on.
coachingTips.speedSlowDetail: {{count}} pace points are below {{low}} wpm. Shorten pauses and avoid dragging the ending.
coachingTips.goalFocusTitle: Keep the next round focused on “{{goal}}”
coachingTips.goalFocusSuccess: You already met this goal. Keep it for another round with a tighter standard, or switch to a harder target.
coachingTips.fallbackDetail: Tap the filler ranking or the abnormal pace points and focus on the segment that needs the most work.

shareCard.fallbackBody: Keep practicing and stabilize the way you speak.
shareCard.defaultInsightBody: There was no obvious filler spike this time. Keep the pace steady.
shareCard.topFillerInsightBody: It appeared {{count}} times this round, so that should be the first speaking habit to fix.
shareCard.topWithSpeed: {{body}} The pace also shows {{summary}}, so re-record the least stable segment first.
shareCard.speedOnly: The pace also shows {{summary}}. Start with the segment where the rhythm swings the most.

shareCard.paceDescription: Recommended range and outliers are condensed into this share card.
shareCard.brandBody: Real-time speech feedback that gives practice sessions clearer direction.
